title: ACT content block — marketing:* namespace (generic)
description: Per PRD-102-R6 through PRD-102-R11. Generic shape for any block whose `type` matches `^marketing:[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$`. The namespace is documented-open: new `marketing:*` types MAY be added in a MINOR bump per PRD-108-R4(4). This schema does not enforce per-type field shapes; canonical fields for `marketing:hero`, `marketing:feature-grid`, `marketing:pricing-table`, `marketing:testimonial`, and `marketing:faq` are specified in PRD-102 §Specification. Conformance: Plus.

type.description: Documented-open namespace. Adding a value is MINOR per PRD-108-R4(4).

metadata.description: Per PRD-102-R20. Component-extracted blocks MUST set `metadata.extracted_via: "component-contract"` and MAY set `metadata.extraction_status` to `"failed"` or `"partial"`.
